description_long: This object consists of a dual-monitor setup with two flat, rectangular screens mounted side by side on a single, central stand. The screens have thin, dark bezels and are slightly angled toward each other, creating a gentle curve for ergonomic viewing. The stand is robust, featuring a wide, V-shaped base that provides stability, and is constructed from a dark, matte material. On either side of the monitors, there are two vertical, rectangular speaker-like objects, also in a dark finish, positioned symmetrically. The rear of the monitors shows a clean, minimal design with no visible buttons or ports. The overall appearance is modern and professional, suitable for office or workstation environments.
description: A dual-monitor setup with thin bezels, a sturdy V-shaped stand, and two side speakers, all in a dark, matte finish. The design is sleek and modern, ideal for a professional workspace.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the dual monitors and the depth of the V-shaped stand.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both screens, thin bezels, and the symmetrical placement of the side speakers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the slimness of the monitors and the stand's structure.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the back of the monitors, the central mounting point, and the clean, cable-free design.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, dark, and has a matte finish with straight edges and no visible decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, V-shaped pedestal made of dark, matte material, providing stable support for the dual monitors.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons are visible on the front, sides, or rear of the monitors in the provided views.
